lead_profile_text: 2-bed unfurnished at 41 Balfour Street, ST11 9PD (Blythe Bridge, Staffordshire). Tenants (family with young children) vacating mid-to-late July 2026. Carpet near-new; Kuldip has not inspected recently. Active portfolio investor already engaged with Stayful on operational tooling (n8n/Monday automation). Views this property as first of several STL acquisitions.
emotional_profile: Practical and investor-minded — wants process clarity and market data. Responds to logic, data, and clear next steps.
what_moved_them: 13%+VAT discount with clear 1 July signing deadline
Portfolio expansion discussion covering Manchester and Leeds markets
what_fell_flat: Liverpool market discussion (already identified as tricky by Kuldip — Zac validated)
Scotland (ruled out due to licensing requirements and annual fees)

conversion_gaps.gap: Furnishing quote and guide not yet sent
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send furnishing guide and pricing breakdown promptly before 1 July deadline
Ask Kuldip to confirm exact vacate date to lock onboarding timeline

zac_income_intro: ~£1,650/month average net (range £1,100 in January to £2,100 at peak summer); bills estimated ~£400/month
zac_analogies: Manchester strong, Liverpool tricky (good weekends, weak weekdays)
